title: CobbleScale
description: Customize the level scaling of spawned Pokemon from Cobblemon
body: # CobbleScale A Fabric server-sided mod allows you to customize the level that Pokemon will spawn around players! There are options for offsets, min, max, scaling modes, blacklisting, per biome modifiers, and more! ## Features - Level Offsets - Customize a range that will randomly be applied to the final level - Min and Max - Control what minimum and maximum levels can possibly spawn - Scale Modes - Change between MEDIAN, AVERAGE, and HIGHEST - Blacklisting - Blacklist certain Pokemon, biomes, or dimensions - Biome Scaling - Set specific biomes to modify the overall level by a multiplier (either higher >1.0, or lower <1.0) ## Installation 1. Download the latest version of the mod from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblescale). 2. Download all required dependencies: - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) 3. Install the mod and dependencies into your server's `mods` folder. 4. Configure your blocks in the `./config/cobblescale/config.json` file. ## Commands/Permissions | Command | Description | Permission | |-----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------| | /cobblescale reload | Reload the Mod | cobblescale.command.reload | | /cobblescale debug | Toggle the debug mode for more insight into errors | cobblescale.command.deug | ## Planned Features - Full expression based customization - Multiple scale presets - and more! please suggest ## Donations This mod was developed as part of the Skies Development goal of **providing free, high quality, and open sourced mods** for the Cobblemon and Fabric communities! If you are able to support this mission, **please consider making a one-time donation or becoming a Member** on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/stampede2011). Being a member gives you early access to all new mods as well as helping decide on the development direction. ## Support A community support Discord has been opened up for all Skies Development related projects! Feel free to join and ask questions or leave suggestions :)
